info.name: gjp-admin-api-boot
info.description:
Complete API collection for gjp-admin-api-boot.

Base URL: http://localhost:8082/api

**Quick Start:**
1. Run "Auth > Tokens > Login" to get a JWT token (auto-saved to collection variable)
2. All authenticated requests use the token automatically via Bearer auth
3. Use the default seed user: username=gjpb, password=123456
